    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="de">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Mi-Werk — Dienstleister in deiner Region</title>
    <!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
    <script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-6Z4QHP5KR2"></script>
    <script>
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
    gtag('js', new Date());
    gtag('config', 'G-6Z4QHP5KR2');
    </script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
    :root {
    --s: #000000;
    --s2: #0A0A0A;
    --s3: #141414;
    --g: #C8956C;
    --g2: #D4A574;
    --w: #FFFFFF;
    --gr: #AAAAAA;
    --gr2: #CCCCCC;
    --rand: rgba(200,149,108,0.2);
    }
    *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
    body{background:var(--s);color:var(--w);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;}
    /* NAV */
    nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;padding:18px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:rgba(14,14,14,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--rand);}
    .logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;}
    .logo-box{width:32px;height:32px;background:var(--g);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:15px;}
    .logo-txt{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:19px;font-weight:700;color:var(--w);}
    .logo-txt span{color:var(--g);}
    .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:32px;}
    .nav-link{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gr2);letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:color 0.2s;text-decoration:none;border:none;background:none;}
    .nav-link:hover,.nav-link.aktiv{color:var(--g);}
    .nav-btn{background:var(--g);color:var(--s);border:none;padding:10px 22px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;}
    .nav-btn:hover{background:var(--w);}
    /* PAGES */
    .page{display:none;padding-top:72px;min-height:100vh;}
    .page.aktiv{display:block;}
    /* ─── STARTSEITE ─── */
    .hero{padding:80px 48px 60px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-height:85vh;display:flex;align-items:center;}
    .hero-deko{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;}
    .hero-k1{position:absolute;width:700px;height:700px;top:-150px;right:-150px;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.06);border-radius:50%;}
    .hero-k2{position:absolute;width:450px;height:450px;top:-50px;right:0;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.04);border-radius:50%;}
    .hero-linie{position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;right:42%;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,rgba(200,149,108,0.12),transparent);}
    .hero-inhalt{max-width:620px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
    .hero-h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(52px,6vw,80px);font-weight:900;line-height:1.02;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin-bottom:22px;}
    .hero-h1 .g{color:var(--g);}
    .hero-h1 .i{font-style:italic;}
    .hero-sub{font-size:17px;color:var(--gr2);line-height:1.75;font-weight:300;max-width:500px;margin-bottom:40px;}
    .hero-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;}
    .btn-p{background:var(--w);color:var(--s);border:none;padding:15px 36px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;}
    .btn-p:hover{background:var(--g);transform:translateY(-2px);}
    .btn-g{background:transparent;color:var(--w);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);padding:15px 36px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;}
    .btn-g:hover{border-color:var(--g);color:var(--g);}
    /* TOP HANDWERKER */
    .top-hw{padding:70px 48px;}
    .sek-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:12px;}
    .sek-titel{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(28px,3vw,42px);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:48px;}
    .hw-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
    .hw-karte{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:28px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.25s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
    .hw-karte::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--g);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform 0.3s;}
    .hw-karte:hover{background:var(--s3);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);}
    .hw-karte:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);}
    .hw-karte-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .hw-emoji{width:52px;height:52px;background:rgba(200,149,108,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;}
    .pro-b{background:var(--s);color:var(--g);padding:3px 10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border:1px solid var(--g);}
    .hw-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .hw-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:12px;}
    .hw-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .hw-karte-bottom{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--rand);}
    .hw-rating{font-size:13px;color:var(--gr2);}
    .hw-rating .s{color:var(--g);}
    .hw-preis{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;}
    .hw-preis span{font-size:13px;font-weight:400;color:var(--gr2);}
    /* VORTEILE */
    .vorteile{padding:70px 48px;background:rgba(200,149,108,0.03);}
    .v-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:48px;}
    .v-box{padding:36px 28px;border:1px solid var(--rand);transition:all 0.3s;}
    .v-box:hover{background:rgba(200,149,108,0.04);}
    .v-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:52px;font-weight:900;color:rgba(200,149,108,0.12);line-height:1;margin-bottom:20px;}
    .v-titel{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.3;}
    .v-text{font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);line-height:1.7;}
    /* CTA BAND */
    .cta-band{background:var(--g);padding:60px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:32px;}
    .cta-band h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(28px,3vw,42px);font-weight:900;color:var(--s);max-width:500px;line-height:1.1;}
    .cta-band-btn{background:var(--s);color:var(--g);border:none;padding:16px 36px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;flex-shrink:0;}
    .cta-band-btn:hover{background:var(--w);color:var(--s);}
    /* ─── SUCHSEITE ─── */
    .suche-header{padding:48px 48px 32px;}
    .suche-header h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(32px,4vw,52px);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .suche-header p{color:var(--gr2);font-size:16px;}
    .suche-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px 1fr;gap:0;padding:0 48px 60px;}
    /* FILTER */
    .filter-panel{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:28px;position:sticky;top:88px;height:fit-content;}
    .filter-kopf{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:24px;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rand);}
    .filter-kopf h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;}
    .filter-reset{font-size:11px;color:var(--g);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;text-decoration:underline;background:none;border:none;}
    .filter-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gr);display:block;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .filter-gruppe{margin-bottom:22px;}
    .f-input{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);padding:10px 14px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--w);width:100%;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
    .f-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--g);}
    .f-input::placeholder{color:#333;}
    .f-select{appearance:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);padding:10px 36px 10px 14px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--w);width:100%;cursor:pointer;}
    .f-select:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--g);}
    .slider-wrap{position:relative;}
    .f-slider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(200,149,108,0.2);outline:none;}
    .f-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:18px;height:18px;background:var(--g);cursor:pointer;border-radius:50%;}
    .slider-labels{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:var(--gr);margin-top:6px;}
    .chip-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:6px;}
    .chip{padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;color:var(--gr2);background:transparent;}
    .chip:hover,.chip.an{background:var(--s);color:var(--g);border-color:var(--g);}
    /* ERGEBNISSE */
    .ergebnisse{padding-left: 24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
    .hw-zeile{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:24px 28px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto;gap:20px;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.25s;}
    .hw-zeile:hover{border-color:var(--g);transform:translateX(4px);}
    .hw-zeile-emoji{width:60px;height:60px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:26px;flex-shrink:0;}
    .hw-zeile-mitte{}
    .hw-zeile-name{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .hw-zeile-name h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:19px;font-weight:700;}
    .tag{display:inline-block;background:rgba(200,149,108,0.1);color:var(--g);padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;}
    .belegt{background:rgba(185,28,28,0.15);color:#f87171;padding:2px 8px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;}
    .hw-zeile-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:8px;}
    .hw-zeile-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);line-height:1.55;}
    .hw-zeile-rechts{text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;}
    .hw-zeile-preis{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;}
    .hw-zeile-preis span{font-size:13px;font-weight:400;color:var(--gr2);}
    .hw-zeile-rating{font-size:12px;color:var(--gr2);}
    .leer{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:60px;text-align:center;}
    .leer-emoji{font-size:40px;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .leer h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .leer p{color:var(--gr2);font-size:14px;}
    /* ─── PROFIL ─── */
    .profil-body{max-width:940px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px;}
    .profil-zurueck{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gr2);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:36px;background:none;border:none;}
    .profil-zurueck:hover{color:var(--g);}
    .profil-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 320px;gap:36px;}
    .profil-links{}
    .profil-kopf{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:36px;margin-bottom:20px;}
    .profil-kopf-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:22px;margin-bottom:24px;}
    .profil-emoji{width:76px;height:76px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:32px;flex-shrink:0;}
    .profil-info h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:30px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .profil-info-meta{font-size:14px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:12px;}
    .profil-badges{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;}
    .verfuegbar{color:#34d399;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}
    .belegt-txt{color:#f87171;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}
    .profil-desc{border-top:1px solid var(--rand);padding-top:22px;}
    .profil-desc h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .profil-desc p{font-size:14px;color:var(--gr);line-height:1.8;}
    .profil-leistungen{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:36px;}
    .profil-leistungen h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:20px;}
    .leistung-zeile{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rand);font-size:14px;color:var(--gr);}
    .leistung-zeile:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
    .leistung-check{color:var(--g);font-weight:700;}
    /* KONTAKT KARTE */
    .kontakt-karte{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:28px;position:sticky;top:88px;}
    .kontakt-preis{text-align:center;padding-bottom:20px;margin-bottom:20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rand);}
    .kontakt-preis-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:44px;font-weight:900;}
    .kontakt-preis-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--gr2);}
    .k-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gr);display:block;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .k-input{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);padding:11px 14px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--w);width:100%;margin-bottom:14px;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
    .k-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--g);}
    .k-input::placeholder{color:#333;}
    .k-textarea{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);padding:11px 14px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--w);width:100%;margin-bottom:14px;resize:vertical;min-height:80px;}
    .k-textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--g);}
    .k-textarea::placeholder{color:#333;}
    .k-btn{width:100%;background:var(--g);color:var(--s);border:none;padding:15px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;}
    .k-btn:hover{background:var(--w);transform:translateY(-1px);}
    .k-hinweis{font-size:11px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;margin-top:12px;}
    /* ─── ANMELDEN ─── */
    .anmelden-body{max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 24px;}
    .anmelden-kopf{text-align:center;margin-bottom:48px;}
    .anmelden-kopf .sek-label{display:block;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .anmelden-kopf h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;}
    .anmelden-kopf p{color:var(--gr2);font-size:16px;}
    .anmelden-box{background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:40px;position:relative;}
    .anmelden-box::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--g),var(--g2),var(--g));}
    .a-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gr);display:block;margin-bottom:6px;}
    .a-input{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);padding:13px 16px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;color:var(--w);width:100%;margin-bottom:18px;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
    .a-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--g);}
    .a-input::placeholder{color:#333;}
    .a-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
    .a-btn{width:100%;background:var(--g);color:var(--s);border:none;padding:16px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;margin-top:4px;}
    .a-btn:hover{background:var(--w);transform:translateY(-2px);}
    .a-hinweis{font-size:12px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;margin-top:16px;}
    .paket-box{background:rgba(200,149,108,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);padding:18px;margin-bottom:18px;font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);line-height:1.7;}
    /* TOAST */
    .toast{position:fixed;bottom:32px;right:32px;background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--g);color:var(--w);padding:18px 28px;font-size:14px;z-index:1000;display:none;animation:slideIn 0.3s ease;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);}
    .toast.zeig{display:block;}
    @keyframes slideIn{from{transform:translateX(100px);opacity:0;}to{transform:translateX(0);opacity:1;}}
    /* FOOTER */
    footer{padding:36px 48px;border-top:1px solid var(--rand);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
    .footer-logo{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:700;}
    .footer-logo span{color:var(--g);}
    .footer-text{font-size:12px;color:var(--gr);}
    .footer-links{display:flex;gap:24px;}
    .footer-link{font-size:12px;color:var(--gr);text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;}
    .footer-link:hover{color:var(--g);}
    .hero-chip{padding:8px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.3);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;color:var(--gr2);background:transparent;border-radius:2px;}
    .hero-chip:hover,.hero-chip.aktiv-chip{background:var(--g);color:var(--s);border-color:var(--g);}
    @media(max-width:768px){
    nav{padding:16px 20px;}
    .nav-links{display:none;}
    .nav-kontakt{display:none !important;}
    .hero,.top-hw,.vorteile,.suche-header{padding-left:20px;padding-right:20px;}
    .hero-h1{font-size:42px;}
    .hw-grid,.v-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .suche-body{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:0 20px 40px;}
    .filter-panel{position:static;}
    .ergebnisse{padding-left:0;margin-top:16px;}
    .profil-body{padding:24px 20px;}
    .profil-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .cta-band{flex-direction:column;padding:40px 20px;}
    footer{flex-direction:column;gap:16px;text-align:center;padding:28px 20px;}
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- NAV -->
    <nav>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;white-space:nowrap;">
    <a class="logo" onclick="zeigSeite('start')" style="cursor:pointer;">
    <div class="logo-txt" style="font-size:22px;white-space:nowrap;">Mi<span>-Werk</span></div>
    </a>
    <button onclick="zeigSeite('start')" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--gr2);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px;" title="Startseite">Startseite</button>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-links">
    <button class="nav-link" onclick="zeigSeite('suche')">Dienstleister finden</button>
    <button class="nav-link" onclick="zeigSeite('anmelden')">Für Dienstleister</button>
    <a href="index.html" class="nav-link">Warteliste</a>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;">
    <div style="text-align:right;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;" class="nav-kontakt">
    <a href="tel:015780609887" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--g);text-decoration:none;">📞 0157 80609887</a>
    <a href="mailto:bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gr);text-decoration:none;">bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com</a>
    </div>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="zeigSeite('anmelden')">Jetzt anmelden</button>
    </div>
    </nav>
    <!-- ─── STARTSEITE ─── -->
    <div id="start" class="page aktiv">
    <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-deko">
    <!-- Großer Kreis links -->
    <div style="position:absolute;width:500px;height:500px;top:-100px;left:-150px;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.08);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;"></div>
    <!-- Kleiner Kreis links -->
    <div style="position:absolute;width:280px;height:280px;top:20px;left:-60px;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.05);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;"></div>
    <!-- Großer Kreis rechts -->
    <div style="position:absolute;width:600px;height:600px;top:-150px;right:-200px;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.08);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;"></div>
    <!-- Kleiner Kreis rechts -->
    <div style="position:absolute;width:320px;height:320px;top:50px;right:-80px;border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.05);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;"></div>
    <!-- Linie links -->
    <div style="position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;left:18%;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,rgba(200,149,108,0.12),transparent);pointer-events:none;"></div>
    <!-- Linie rechts -->
    <div style="position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;right:18%;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,rgba(200,149,108,0.12),transparent);pointer-events:none;"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:100%;max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:1;">
    <h1 class="hero-h1" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:clamp(56px,7vw,88px);">Den richtigen<br><span class="g">Dienstleister</span><br>finden.</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub" style="text-align:center;margin:0 auto 40px;font-size:19px;">Mi-Werk verbindet Dienstleister mit Kunden in ihrer Region — fair, lokal und ohne Risiko.</p>
    <!-- SUCHBEREICH -->
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.25);padding:28px 32px;margin-bottom:40px;">
    <!-- Suchleiste oben -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;">
    <input class="f-input" id="hero-freitext" placeholder="🔍 Was suchst du?" style="grid-column:1/-1;padding:13px 16px;font-size:15px;" oninput="heroSuchen()">
    <input class="f-input" id="hero-ort" placeholder="📍 Stadt…" style="padding:13px 16px;" oninput="heroSuchen()">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
    <input class="f-input" type="number" id="hero-tag" placeholder="TT" min="1" max="31" style="flex:1;padding:13px 6px;font-size:14px;text-align:center;" onchange="heroSuchen()">
    <input class="f-input" type="number" id="hero-monat" placeholder="MM" min="1" max="12" style="flex:1;padding:13px 6px;font-size:14px;text-align:center;" onchange="heroSuchen()">
    <input class="f-input" type="number" id="hero-jahr" placeholder="JJJJ" min="2024" max="2030" style="flex:1.5;padding:13px 6px;font-size:14px;text-align:center;" onchange="heroSuchen()">
    </div>
    <button class="btn-p" style="grid-column:1/-1;padding:13px 24px;font-size:13px;" onclick="heroSuchen()">Suchen</button>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:16px;">Kategorie auswählen</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:24px;" id="hero-chips">
    <div class="hero-chip aktiv-chip" onclick="heroFilter('')">Alle</div>
    <div style="width:100%;font-size:10px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">🔨 Handwerk</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Elektriker')">⚡ Elektriker</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Maler')">🖌️ Maler</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Klempner')">🔧 Klempner</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Tischler')">🪵 Tischler</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Fliesenleger')">🟦 Fliesenleger</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Dachdecker')">🏠 Dachdecker</div>
    <div style="width:100%;font-size:10px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;margin-top:8px;">🏥 Gesundheit</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Zahnarzt')">🦷 Zahnarzt</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Kieferorthopäde')">😁 Kieferorthopäde</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Physiotherapeut')">💪 Physiotherapeut</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Hausarzt')">🩺 Hausarzt</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Kinderarzt')">👶 Kinderarzt</div>
    <div style="width:100%;font-size:10px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;margin-top:8px;">💈 Beauty & Pflege</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Friseur')">✂️ Friseur</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Kosmetiker')">💄 Kosmetiker</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Nagelstudio')">💅 Nagelstudio</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Massage')">🧘 Massage</div>
    <div style="width:100%;font-size:10px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;margin-top:8px;">🐾 Tiere</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Tierarzt')">🐾 Tierarzt</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Hundefriseur')">🐶 Hundefriseur</div>
    <div style="width:100%;font-size:10px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;margin-top:8px;">🏋️ Fitness & Bildung</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Personal Trainer')">🏋️ Personal Trainer</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Ernährungsberater')">🥗 Ernährungsberater</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Nachhilfelehrer')">📚 Nachhilfe</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Fahrlehrer')">🚗 Fahrlehrer</div>
    <div style="width:100%;font-size:10px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;margin-top:8px;">🚗 Auto</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Autowerkstatt')">🔩 Autowerkstatt</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Reifenservice')">🛞 Reifenservice</div>
    <div style="width:100%;font-size:10px;color:var(--gr);text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;margin-top:8px;">🎓 Hilfskräfte</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Bürohilfe')">💼 Bürohilfe</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Lagerhilfe')">📦 Lagerhilfe</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Veranstaltungshelfer')">🎪 Veranstaltung</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Handwerkshelfer')">🔨 Handwerkshelfer</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Pflegehilfe')">❤️ Pflegehilfe</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('IT-Hilfe')">💻 IT-Hilfe</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Gastronomiehelfer')">🍽️ Gastronomie</div>
    <div class="hero-chip" onclick="heroFilter('Medizinstudent')">🩺 Medizinstudent</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- TOP ERGEBNISSE -->
    <div id="hero-ergebnisse" style="display:none;">
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:20px;" id="hero-label">Top bewertete Dienstleister</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;" id="hero-grid"></div>
    <button onclick="zeigSeite('suche')" style="margin-top:24px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--g);cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:underline;">Alle Dienstleister anzeigen →</button>
    </div>
    <div id="hero-btns-wrap" style="display:none;">
    <button class="btn-p" onclick="zeigSeite('suche')">Alle Dienstleister</button>
    <button class="btn-g" onclick="zeigSeite('anmelden')">Als Dienstleister eintragen</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <section class="vorteile">
    <div class="sek-label">Warum Mi-Werk</div>
    <h2 class="sek-titel">Anders als alle anderen.</h2>
    <div class="v-grid">
    <div class="v-box"><div class="v-num">01</div><div class="v-titel">Faire Flatrate — kein Bezahlen pro Kontaktaufnahme</div><div class="v-text">Du zahlst einen festen Monatsbeitrag. Keine bösen Überraschungen am Monatsende.</div></div>
    <div class="v-box"><div class="v-num">02</div><div class="v-titel">Nur Kunden aus deiner Region</div><div class="v-text">Du wirst gezielt Kunden in deiner Stadt angezeigt — keine Konkurrenz aus dem ganzen Bundesgebiet.</div></div>
    <div class="v-box"><div class="v-num">03</div><div class="v-titel">In 5 Minuten eingetragen</div><div class="v-text">Profil erstellen, Gewerk & Preis angeben — fertig. Kunden finden dich direkt über die Suche.</div></div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <div class="cta-band">
    <h2>Bist du Dienstleister?<br>Werde jetzt sichtbar.</h2>
    <button class="cta-band-btn" onclick="zeigSeite('anmelden')">Kostenlos eintragen</button>
    </div>
    <footer>
    <div class="footer-logo">Mi<span>-Werk</span></div>
    <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div class="footer-text" style="margin-bottom:6px;">© 2025 Mi-Werk · Bochum</div>
    <div class="footer-text" style="font-size:11px;color:#333;">Hosting: GitHub Pages · Domain: United Domains</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:right;">
    <div class="footer-links" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
    <span class="footer-link" onclick="zeigSeite('impressum')">Impressum</span>
    <span class="footer-link" onclick="zeigSeite('datenschutz')">Datenschutz</span>
    <span class="footer-link" onclick="zeigSeite('agb')">AGB</span>
    <span class="footer-link" onclick="zeigSeite('kontakt')">Kontakt</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </footer>
    </div>
    <!-- ─── SUCHSEITE ─── -->
    <div id="suche" class="page">
    <div class="suche-header">
    <h1>Dienstleister finden</h1>
    <p id="anz-text">Lade Dienstleister...</p>
    </div>
    <div class="suche-body">
    <div class="filter-panel">
    <div class="filter-kopf">
    <h3>Filter</h3>
    <button class="filter-reset" onclick="filterReset()">Zurücksetzen</button>
    </div>
    <div class="filter-gruppe">
    <label class="filter-label">Suche</label>
    <input class="f-input" id="f-suche" placeholder="Name, Beschreibung…" oninput="filtern()">
    </div>
    <div class="filter-gruppe">
    <label class="filter-label">Stadt oder Region</label>
    <input class="f-input" id="f-ort" placeholder="z.B. Bochum, NRW…" oninput="filtern()">
    </div>
    <div class="filter-gruppe">
    <label class="filter-label">Gewerk</label>
    <select class="f-select" id="f-gewerk" onchange="filtern();updateChips()">
    <option value="">Alle Kategorien</option>
    <optgroup label="🔨 Handwerk">
    <option>Elektriker</option>
    <option>Maler</option>
    <option>Klempner</option>
    <option>Tischler</option>
    <option>Fliesenleger</option>
    <option>Dachdecker</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🏥 Gesundheit">
    <option>Zahnarzt</option>
    <option>Kieferorthopäde</option>
    <option>Physiotherapeut</option>
    <option>Hausarzt</option>
    <option>Kinderarzt</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="💈 Beauty & Pflege">
    <option>Friseur</option>
    <option>Kosmetiker</option>
    <option>Nagelstudio</option>
    <option>Massage</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🐾 Tiere">
    <option>Tierarzt</option>
    <option>Hundefriseur</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🏋️ Fitness & Bildung">
    <option>Personal Trainer</option>
    <option>Ernährungsberater</option>
    <option>Nachhilfelehrer</option>
    <option>Fahrlehrer</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🚗 Auto">
    <option>Autowerkstatt</option>
    <option>Reifenservice</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🎓 Hilfskräfte">
    <option>Bürohilfe</option>
    <option>Lagerhilfe</option>
    <option>Veranstaltungshelfer</option>
    <option>Handwerkshelfer</option>
    <option>Pflegehilfe</option>
    <option>IT-Hilfe</option>
    <option>Gastronomiehelfer</option>
    <option>Medizinstudent</option>
    </optgroup>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div class="filter-gruppe" id="chip-gruppe" style="display:none">
    <label class="filter-label">Leistung</label>
    <div class="chip-wrap" id="chip-wrap"></div>
    <input class="f-input" id="f-leistung" placeholder="Oder freie Suche…" oninput="filtern()" style="margin-top:8px">
    </div>
    <div class="filter-gruppe">
    <label class="filter-label">Max. Preis: <span id="preis-val" style="color:var(--g)">200€/h</span></label>
    <input class="f-slider" type="range" min="0" max="200" value="200" id="f-preis" oninput="document.getElementById('preis-val').textContent=this.value+'€/h';filtern()">
    <div class="slider-labels"><span>0€</span><span>200€</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="filter-gruppe">
    <label class="filter-label">📅 Datum</label>
    <input class="f-input" type="date" id="f-datum" onchange="filtern()" style="color-scheme:dark;">
    </div>
    <div class="filter-gruppe">
    <label class="filter-label">🕐 Uhrzeit</label>
    <select class="f-select" id="f-uhrzeit" onchange="filtern()">
    <option value="">Beliebige Uhrzeit</option>
    <option value="08:00">08:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="09:00">09:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="10:00">10:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="11:00">11:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="12:00">12:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="13:00">13:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="14:00">14:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="15:00">15:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="16:00">16:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="17:00">17:00 Uhr</option>
    <option value="18:00">18:00 Uhr</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <button onclick="filtern()" style="width:100%;background:var(--g);color:var(--s);border:none;padding:12px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;">🔍 Suchen</button>
    </div>
    <div class="ergebnisse" id="ergebnisse"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ─── PROFIL ─── -->
    <div id="profil" class="page">
    <div class="profil-body">
    <button class="profil-zurueck" onclick="zeigSeite('suche')">← Zurück zur Suche</button>
    <div class="profil-grid">
    <div class="profil-links">
    <div class="profil-kopf">
    <div class="profil-kopf-top">
    <div class="profil-emoji" id="p-emoji"></div>
    <div class="profil-info">
    <h1 id="p-name"></h1>
    <div class="profil-info-meta" id="p-meta"></div>
    <div class="profil-badges">
    <div id="p-verf"></div>
    <div id="p-pro"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="profil-desc">
    <h3>Über mich</h3>
    <p id="p-desc"></p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="profil-leistungen">
    <h3>Leistungen</h3>
    <div class="leistung-zeile"><span class="leistung-check">✓</span> Erstberatung (kostenlos)</div>
    <div class="leistung-zeile"><span class="leistung-check">✓</span> Angebotserstellung</div>
    <div class="leistung-zeile"><span class="leistung-check">✓</span> Ausführung & Umsetzung</div>
    <div class="leistung-zeile"><span class="leistung-check">✓</span> Nachbetreuung</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div>
    <div class="kontakt-karte">
    <div class="kontakt-preis">
    <div class="kontakt-preis-num" id="p-preis"></div>
    <div class="kontakt-preis-sub">pro Stunde</div>
    </div>
    <label class="k-label">Dein Name</label>
    <input class="k-input" placeholder="Max Mustermann" id="k-name">
    <label class="k-label">E-Mail</label>
    <input class="k-input" placeholder="max@beispiel.de" id="k-email">
    <label class="k-label">Nachricht</label>
    <textarea class="k-textarea" placeholder="Beschreibe kurz dein Projekt…"></textarea>
    <button class="k-btn" onclick="anfrageSenden()">Anfrage senden</button>
    <div class="k-hinweis">Kostenlos und unverbindlich</div>
    <div style="margin-top:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--rand);padding-top:14px;">
    <button class="k-btn" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--g);color:var(--g);" onclick="terminBuchen()">📅 Termin buchen</button>
    <div class="k-hinweis" style="margin-top:8px;">Direkt in den Kalender des Dienstleisters</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ─── ANMELDEN ─── -->
    <div id="anmelden" class="page">
    <div class="anmelden-body">
    <div class="anmelden-kopf">
    <span class="sek-label">Für Dienstleister</span>
    <h1>Profil erstellen</h1>
    <p>Werde sichtbar für tausende Kunden in deiner Region.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="anmelden-box">
    <form action="https://formspree.io/f/xgoqavpa" method="POST" onsubmit="speichereKategorie();setTimeout(()=>zeigSeite('zahlung'),100)">
    <div class="a-row">
    <div><label class="a-label">Vorname</label><input class="a-input" name="vorname" placeholder="Max"></div>
    <div><label class="a-label">Nachname</label><input class="a-input" name="nachname" placeholder="Mustermann"></div>
    </div>
    <label class="a-label">E-Mail-Adresse</label>
    <input class="a-input" name="email" placeholder="max@beispiel.de" type="email">
    <label class="a-label">Telefonnummer</label>
    <input class="a-input" name="telefon" placeholder="+49 …" type="tel">
    <div class="a-row">
    <div>
    <label class="a-label">Kategorie</label>
    <select class="a-input" name="kategorie" id="anmeld-kategorie" style="appearance:none;cursor:pointer;" onchange="updateAnmeldPreis()">
    <option value="">Bitte wählen...</option>
    <optgroup label="🔨 Handwerk">
    <option value="handwerk">Elektriker, Maler, Klempner etc.</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🏥 Gesundheit">
    <option value="gesundheit">Arzt, Zahnarzt, Physiotherapeut etc.</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="💈 Beauty & Pflege">
    <option value="beauty">Friseur, Kosmetiker, Nagelstudio etc.</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🐾 Tiere">
    <option value="tiere">Tierarzt, Hundefriseur etc.</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🏋️ Fitness & Bildung">
    <option value="fitness">Personal Trainer, Nachhilfe etc.</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🚗 Auto">
    <option value="auto">Autowerkstatt, Reifenservice etc.</option>
    </optgroup>
    <optgroup label="🎓 Hilfskräfte">
    <option value="hilfe">Bürohilfe, Lagerhilfe, Gastronomie etc.</option>
    </optgroup>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div><label class="a-label">Stadt / PLZ</label><input class="a-input" name="stadt" placeholder="Bochum, 44801"></div>
    </div>
    <label class="a-label">Genaues Gewerk / Tätigkeit</label>
    <input class="a-input" name="gewerk_genau" placeholder="z.B. Nagelstudio, Elektroinstallation, Kinderzahnarzt…">
    <label class="a-label">Stundensatz / Preis (€)</label>
    <input class="a-input" name="stundensatz" placeholder="z.B. 65" type="number">
    <label class="a-label">Kurzbeschreibung</label>
    <input class="a-input" name="beschreibung" placeholder="Was machst du? Was zeichnet dich aus?">
    <label class="a-label">Calendly Link (optional)</label>
    <input class="a-input" name="calendly" placeholder="z.B. calendly.com/deinname" type="url">
    <button class="a-btn" type="submit">Als Dienstleister registrieren →</button>
    <div class="a-hinweis">Keine Kreditkarte nötig · Jederzeit kündbar</div>
    </form>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ─── ZAHLUNG ─── -->
    <div id="zahlung" class="page">
    <div class="anmelden-body">
    <div class="anmelden-kopf">
    <span class="sek-label">Letzter Schritt</span>
    <h1>Paket wählen</h1>
    <p>Wähle dein Paket und starte direkt durch.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:32px;">
    <div style="background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:32px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;" onclick="paketWaehlen('probe')" id="paket-basic">
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:8px;">Einstieg</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:900;color:var(--g);line-height:1;">0€</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:700;">6 Monate kostenlos</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:4px;">danach 2 Monate <span id="probe-preis">19,99€</span> / Monat</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:20px;">dann <span id="probe-normal-preis">34,99€</span> / Monat</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);margin-bottom:6px;">✓ Profil sichtbar</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);margin-bottom:6px;">✓ Kontaktformular</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);">✓ E-Mail Support</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gr);margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--rand);">3 Monate Kündigungsfrist</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(200,149,108,0.08);border:1px solid var(--g);padding:32px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;position:relative;" onclick="paketWaehlen('standard')" id="paket-pro">
    <div style="position:absolute;top:-1px;left:24px;background:var(--g);color:var(--s);padding:3px 12px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">EMPFOHLEN</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:8px;">Standard</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:900;color:white;line-height:1;" id="standard-preis-display">34,99€</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:20px;">/ Monat</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);margin-bottom:6px;">✓ Alles aus Einstieg</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);margin-bottom:6px;">✓ Priorität in Suche</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);">✓ Unbegrenzt Fotos</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gr);margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.2);">3 Monate Kündigungsfrist</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="anmelden-box" style="text-align:center;padding:40px;">
    <div style="font-size:32px;margin-bottom:16px;">🔒</div>
    <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:12px;">Sichere Zahlung mit Stripe</h3>
    <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:28px;">Deine Bankdaten werden sicher verschlüsselt. Jederzeit kündbar.</p>
    <button class="a-btn" id="stripe-btn" onclick="stripeWeiterleitung()" style="max-width:400px;margin:0 auto;">Jetzt bezahlen →</button>
    <div class="a-hinweis" style="margin-top:12px;">Noch nicht verfügbar — kommt bald!</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- COOKIE BANNER -->
    <div id="cookie-banner" style="position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:999;background:var(--s2);border-top:1px solid var(--rand);padding:20px 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;">
    <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gr2);line-height:1.6;">🍪 Diese Website verwendet Cookies für Google Analytics um das Nutzerverhalten zu analysieren. <span onclick="zeigSeite('datenschutz')" style="color:var(--g);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;">Mehr erfahren</span></p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;">
    <button onclick="cookieAblehnen()" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--rand);color:var(--gr2);padding:10px 20px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Ablehnen</button>
    <button onclick="cookieAkzeptieren()" style="background:var(--g);border:none;color:var(--s);padding:10px 20px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Akzeptieren</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
    <!-- ─── KONTAKT ─── -->
    <div id="kontakt" class="page">
    <div style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 24px;">
    <button onclick="history.back()" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gr2);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;margin-bottom:32px;display:block;">← Zurück</button>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:32px;">Kontakt</h1>
    <div style="background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:36px;">
    <p style="font-size:15px;color:var(--gr2);margin-bottom:32px;line-height:1.8;">Du hast Fragen zu Mi-Werk oder möchtest dich als Dienstleister eintragen? Melde dich gerne direkt bei mir!</p>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;">
    <div style="width:44px;height:44px;background:var(--g);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;">📞</div>
    <div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gr);margin-bottom:4px;">Telefon</div>
    <a href="tel:015780609887" style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--w);text-decoration:none;">0157 80609887</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;">
    <div style="width:44px;height:44px;background:var(--g);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;">✉️</div>
    <div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gr);margin-bottom:4px;">E-Mail</div>
    <a href="mailto:bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com" style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--w);text-decoration:none;">bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;">
    <div style="width:44px;height:44px;background:var(--g);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;">🌐</div>
    <div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gr);margin-bottom:4px;">Website</div>
    <a href="https://mi-werk.de" style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--g);text-decoration:none;">mi-werk.de</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:28px;padding-top:24px;border-top:1px solid var(--rand);font-size:13px;color:var(--gr);">
    Ben Middeldorf — Gründer Mi-Werk · Bochum
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ─── IMPRESSUM ─── -->
    <div id="impressum" class="page">
    <div style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 24px;">
    <button onclick="history.back()" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gr2);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;margin-bottom:32px;display:block;">← Zurück</button>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:32px;">Impressum</h1>
    <div style="background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:36px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--gr2);font-size:15px;">
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">Angaben gemäß § 5 TMG</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--w);">Ben Middeldorf</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:8px;">Mi-Werk (in Gründung)</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Bochum, Deutschland</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:8px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">Kontakt</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:4px;">Telefon: 0157 80609887</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">E-Mail: bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:8px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">Hinweis</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;">Die Mi-Werk UG (haftungsbeschränkt) befindet sich derzeit in Gründung. Nach Eintragung ins Handelsregister wird dieses Impressum entsprechend aktualisiert.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:8px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">Hosting & Technik</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:4px;">Hosting: GitHub Pages · GitHub Inc., 88 Colin P Kelly Jr St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA</p>
    <p>Domain: United Domains AG · Gautinger Str. 10, 82319 Starnberg, Deutschland</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ─── DATENSCHUTZ ─── -->
    <div id="datenschutz" class="page">
    <div style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 24px;">
    <button onclick="history.back()" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gr2);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;margin-bottom:32px;display:block;">← Zurück</button>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:32px;">Datenschutz</h1>
    <div style="background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:36px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--gr2);font-size:15px;">
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">1. Verantwortlicher</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Ben Middeldorf, bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">2. Erhobene Daten</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Bei der Registrierung erheben wir Name, E-Mail-Adresse, Telefonnummer, Gewerk und Stadt. Diese Daten werden ausschließlich zur Kontaktaufnahme und zur Bereitstellung unserer Dienstleistung verwendet.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">3. Google Analytics</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Diese Website nutzt Google Analytics zur Analyse des Nutzerverhaltens. Die Daten werden anonymisiert erfasst. Sie können der Erfassung widersprechen indem Sie einen Ad-Blocker verwenden.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">4. Formspree</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Formulardaten werden über Formspree (formspree.io) verarbeitet. Es gelten die Datenschutzbestimmungen von Formspree.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">5. Ihre Rechte</strong></p>
    <p>Sie haben das Recht auf Auskunft, Berichtigung und Löschung Ihrer Daten. Kontakt: bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ─── AGB ─── -->
    <div id="agb" class="page">
    <div style="max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 24px;">
    <button onclick="history.back()" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gr2);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;margin-bottom:32px;display:block;">← Zurück</button>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:42px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:32px;">AGB</h1>
    <div style="background:var(--s2);border:1px solid var(--rand);padding:36px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--gr2);font-size:15px;">
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">1. Geltungsbereich</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Diese AGB gelten für alle Verträge zwischen Mi-Werk und Dienstleistern die sich auf der Plattform mi-werk.de registrieren.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">2. Leistungen</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Mi-Werk stellt eine Online-Plattform bereit die Dienstleister und Kunden in ihrer Region zusammenbringt. Die Sichtbarkeit des Profils ist abhängig vom gebuchten Paket.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">3. Preise und Zahlung</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Die monatlichen Nutzungsgebühren sind je nach Kategorie des Dienstleisters gestaffelt. Die genauen Preise werden auf Nachfrage transparent dargestellt und vor Vertragsabschluss mitgeteilt. Die Zahlung erfolgt monatlich im Voraus.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">4. Kündigungsfrist</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:24px;">Die Kündigungsfrist beträgt 3 Monate zum Monatsende. Die Kündigung muss schriftlich per E-Mail an bm.miwerk.de@gmail.com erfolgen.</p>
    <p style="margin-bottom:16px;"><strong style="color:var(--w);">5. Haftung</strong></p>
    <p>Mi-Werk übernimmt keine Haftung für die Qualität der angebotenen Dienstleistungen. Die Plattform dient ausschließlich der Vermittlung.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    const HANDWERKER = [
    {
    id: 1,
    name: "Madeleine Kouznetsov",
    gewerk: "Medizinstudent",
    ort: "Bonn",
    umkreis: "NRW",
    preis: 17,
    bew: 5.0,
    bew_anz: 0,
    desc: "Ich bin Zahnmedizinstudentin im 6. Semester. Ich bin zuverlässig, aufmerksam und sehr verantwortungsbewusst.",
    verf: true,
    paket: "Pro",
    emoji: "🩺",
    farbe: "#10B981",
    calendly: ""
    },
    ];
    const CHIPS = {
    Elektriker:["Smart Home","Solar","Reparatur","Neuinstallation","Beleuchtung"],
    Maler:["Innenräume","Fassade","Tapezieren","Lackierung","Restaurierung"],
    Klempner:["Badezimmer","Heizung","Rohre","Sanitär","Wasserschaden"],
    Tischler:["Maßmöbel","Türen & Fenster","Treppen","Küche","Einbauschränke"],
    Fliesenleger:["Badezimmer","Küche","Terrasse","Naturstein","Großformat"],
    Dachdecker:["Dachsanierung","Dämmung","Flachdach","Dachfenster","Neueindeckung"],
    Zahnarzt:["Prophylaxe","Implantate","Zahnkorrektur","Bleaching","Notfallbehandlung"],
    Kieferorthopäde:["Brackets","Aligner","Retainer","Erstberatung","Kinder & Jugendliche"],
    Physiotherapeut:["Rücken","Sportreha","Massage","Krankengymnastik","Hausbesuche"],
    Hausarzt:["Vorsorge","Impfungen","Überweisung","Blutabnahme","Akuttermine"],
    Kinderarzt:["Vorsorge","Impfungen","Akuttermine","U-Untersuchungen","Beratung"],
    Friseur:["Haarschnitt","Färben","Stylen","Hochzeitsfrisur","Kinder"],
    Kosmetiker:["Gesichtsbehandlung","Waxing","Make-up","Wimpern","Peeling"],
    Nagelstudio:["Gel-Nägel","Shellac","Nageldesign","Maniküre","Pediküre"],
    Massage:["Entspannungsmassage","Sportmassage","Rückenmassage","Hot Stone","Lymphdrainage"],
    Tierarzt:["Impfungen","Notfall","Kastration","Zahnpflege","Vorsorge"],
    Hundefriseur:["Scheren","Baden","Krallen","Fell pflegen","Ohrenreinigung"],
    "Personal Trainer":["Krafttraining","Abnehmen","Ausdauer","Ernährung","Online Coaching"],
    Ernährungsberater:["Gewichtsabnahme","Muskelaufbau","Allergien","Sporternährung","Erstberatung"],
    Nachhilfelehrer:["Mathematik","Englisch","Deutsch","Physik","Abitur"],
    Fahrlehrer:["Führerschein B","Automatik","Intensivkurs","Auffrischung","Motorrad"],
    Autowerkstatt:["Inspektion","TÜV","Reifenwechsel","Bremsen","Unfallschaden"],
    Reifenservice:["Sommerreifen","Winterreifen","Einlagern","Felgen","RDKS"],
    "Bürohilfe":["Verwaltung","Dateneingabe","Empfang","Ablage","Kopieren"],
    "Lagerhilfe":["Kommissionierung","Verpackung","Wareneingang","Inventur","Transport"],
    "Veranstaltungshelfer":["Aufbau","Abbau","Catering","Einlass","Technik"],
    "Handwerkshelfer":["Materialtransport","Aufräumen","Assistenz","Reinigung","Montage"],
    "Pflegehilfe":["Betreuung","Begleitung","Hauswirtschaft","Einkaufen","Vorlesen"],
    "IT-Hilfe":["PC-Support","Netzwerk","Software","Hardware","Einrichtung"],
    "Gastronomiehelfer":["Service","Küche","Theke","Spülen","Auf- & Abbau"],
    "Medizinstudent":["Praxisassistenz","Forschung","Patientenbetreuung","Verwaltung","Blutabnahme"],
    };
    let aktivChip = "";
    let aktivHW = null;
    function filtern(){
    const suche = document.getElementById('f-suche').value.toLowerCase();
    const ort = document.getElementById('f-ort').value.toLowerCase();
    const gewerk = document.getElementById('f-gewerk').value;
    const preis = parseInt(document.getElementById('f-preis').value);
    const leistung = document.getElementById('f-leistung')?.value.toLowerCase()||'';
    const datum = document.getElementById('f-datum')?.value || '';
    const uhrzeit = document.getElementById('f-uhrzeit')?.value || '';
    const gef = HANDWERKER.filter(h=>{
    const mGewerk = !gewerk || h.gewerk===gewerk;
    const mOrt = !ort || h.ort.toLowerCase().includes(ort) || h.umkreis.toLowerCase().includes(ort);
    const mPreis = !h.preis || h.preis<=preis;
    const mSuche = !suche || h.name.toLowerCase().includes(suche) || h.gewerk.toLowerCase().includes(suche) || h.desc.toLowerCase().includes(suche);
    const mChip = !aktivChip || h.desc.toLowerCase().includes(aktivChip.toLowerCase());
    const mLeistung = !leistung || h.desc.toLowerCase().includes(leistung);
    const mVerf = !datum || h.verf;
    return mGewerk&&mOrt&&mPreis&&mSuche&&mChip&&mLeistung&&mVerf;
    });
    document.getElementById('anz-text').textContent = `${gef.length} Dienstleister gefunden`;
    const cont = document.getElementById('ergebnisse');
    if(gef.length===0){
    // Alternativen vorschlagen wenn Datum gesetzt
    if(datum) {
    const alternativen = HANDWERKER.filter(h=>{
    const mGewerk = !gewerk || h.gewerk===gewerk;
    return mGewerk && h.verf;
    }).slice(0,3);
    if(alternativen.length > 0) {
    const uhrzeitAlt = uhrzeit ?
    ['30 Min später', '1 Std später', 'Am nächsten Tag'].map((t,i) => {
    const [h,m] = uhrzeit.split(':').map(Number);
    const neu = new Date(2000,0,1,h,m + (i===0?30:i===1?60:0));
    return i===2 ? 'nächster Tag' : `${String(neu.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(neu.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')} Uhr`;
    }) : [];
    cont.innerHTML = `
    <div style="background:rgba(200,149,108,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(200,149,108,0.3);padding:20px;margin-bottom:20px;">
    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:8px;">💡 Für dieses Datum keine Treffer — hier sind Alternativen:</div>
    ${uhrzeitAlt.length ? `<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--gr2);">Mögliche Zeiten: ${uhrzeitAlt.join(' · ')}</div>` : ''}
    </div>
    ${alternativen.map(h=>`
    <div class="hw-zeile" onclick="zeigProfil(${h.id})">
    <div class="hw-zeile-emoji" style="background:${h.farbe}22">${h.emoji}</div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-mitte">
    <div class="hw-zeile-name">
    <h3>${h.name}</h3>
    ${h.paket==='Pro'?'<div class="pro-b">PRO</div>':''}
    <div style="color:#34d399;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">✓ Verfügbar</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-meta"><span class="tag">${h.gewerk}</span> &nbsp;📍 ${h.ort}</div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-desc">${h.desc}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-rechts">
    <div class="hw-zeile-preis">${h.preis}€<span>/h</span></div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-rating"><span style="color:var(--g)">★</span> ${h.bew}</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    `).join('')}
    `;
    return;
    }
    }
    cont.innerHTML = `<div class="leer"><div class="leer-emoji">🔍</div><h3>Keine Treffer</h3><p>Versuche andere Filtereinstellungen.</p></div>`;
    return;
    }
    cont.innerHTML = gef.map(h=>`
    <div class="hw-zeile" onclick="zeigProfil(${h.id})">
    <div class="hw-zeile-emoji" style="background:${h.farbe}22">${h.emoji}</div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-mitte">
    <div class="hw-zeile-name">
    <h3>${h.name}</h3>
    ${h.paket==='Pro'?'<div class="pro-b">PRO</div>':''}
    ${!h.verf?'<div class="belegt">BELEGT</div>':''}
    </div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-meta"><span class="tag">${h.gewerk}</span> &nbsp;📍 ${h.ort} · ${h.umkreis}</div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-desc">${h.desc}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-rechts">
    <div class="hw-zeile-preis">${h.preis}€<span>/h</span></div>
    <div class="hw-zeile-rating"><span style="color:var(--g)">★</span> ${h.bew} <span style="color:var(--gr)">(${h.bew_anz})</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    `).join('');
    }
    function updateChips(){
    const gewerk = document.getElementById('f-gewerk').value;
    const gr = document.getElementById('chip-gruppe');
    const wrap = document.getElementById('chip-wrap');
    aktivChip = "";
    if(!gewerk||!CHIPS[gewerk]){gr.style.display='none';return;}
    gr.style.display='block';
    wrap.innerHTML = CHIPS[gewerk].map(c=>`<div class="chip" onclick="toggleChip(this,'${c}')">${c}</div>`).join('');
    }
    function toggleChip(el, val){
    document.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('an'));
    if(aktivChip===val){aktivChip="";}
    else{aktivChip=val;el.classList.add('an');}
    filtern();
    }
    function filterReset(){
    document.getElementById('f-suche').value='';
    document.getElementById('f-ort').value='';
    document.getElementById('f-gewerk').value='';
    document.getElementById('f-preis').value=200;
    document.getElementById('preis-val').textContent='200€/h';
    document.getElementById('f-datum').value='';
    document.getElementById('f-uhrzeit').value='';
    if(document.getElementById('f-leistung'))document.getElementById('f-leistung').value='';
    aktivChip='';
    document.getElementById('chip-gruppe').style.display='none';
    filtern();
    }
    function zeigProfil(id){
    aktivHW = HANDWERKER.find(h=>h.id===id);
    if(!aktivHW)return;
    document.getElementById('p-emoji').style.cssText=`background:${aktivHW.farbe}22;width:76px;height:76px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:32px;`;
    document.getElementById('p-emoji').textContent=aktivHW.emoji;
    document.getElementById('p-name').textContent=aktivHW.name;
    document.getElementById('p-meta').textContent=`${aktivHW.gewerk} · 📍 ${aktivHW.ort} · ${aktivHW.umkreis} · ★ ${aktivHW.bew} (${aktivHW.bew_anz} Bewertungen)`;
    document.getElementById('p-verf').innerHTML=aktivHW.verf?'<span class="verfuegbar">✓ Verfügbar</span>':'<span class="belegt-txt">✗ Derzeit belegt</span>';
    document.getElementById('p-pro').innerHTML=aktivHW.paket==='Pro'?'<div class="pro-b">PRO</div>':'';
    document.getElementById('p-desc').textContent=aktivHW.desc+' Ich bin seit über einem Jahrzehnt in meinem Handwerk tätig und lege größten Wert auf Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit.';
    document.getElementById('p-preis').textContent=aktivHW.preis+'€';
    zeigSeite('profil');
    }
    // Cookie Banner
    function cookiePruefen() {
    const consent = localStorage.getItem('cookie-consent');
    if (consent === 'accepted') {
    document.getElementById('cookie-banner').style.display = 'none';
    } else if (consent === 'rejected') {
    document.getElementById('cookie-banner').style.display = 'none';
    // Google Analytics deaktivieren
    window['ga-disable-G-6Z4QHP5KR2'] = true;
    }
    }
    function cookieAkzeptieren() {
    localStorage.setItem('cookie-consent', 'accepted');
    document.getElementById('cookie-banner').style.display = 'none';
    }
    function cookieAblehnen() {
    localStorage.setItem('cookie-consent', 'rejected');
    window['ga-disable-G-6Z4QHP5KR2'] = true;
    document.getElementById('cookie-banner').style.display = 'none';
    }
    cookiePruefen();
    const PREISE = {
    handwerk: { probe: '19,99€', standard: '34,99€', normal: '34,99€' },
    gesundheit:{ probe: '29,99€', standard: '44,99€', normal: '44,99€' },
    beauty: { probe: '9,99€', standard: '19,99€', normal: '19,99€' },
    tiere: { probe: '14,99€', standard: '24,99€', normal: '24,99€' },
    fitness: { probe: '14,99€', standard: '24,99€', normal: '24,99€' },
    auto: { probe: '19,99€', standard: '34,99€', normal: '34,99€' },
    hilfe: { probe: '9,99€', standard: '14,99€', normal: '14,99€' },
    };
    let gewaehlteKategorie = 'handwerk';
    function speichereKategorie() {
    const sel = document.getElementById('anmeld-kategorie');
    gewaehlteKategorie = sel.value || 'handwerk';
    View remainder of file in raw view
